    void
    testBug702()
    Ensures that creating a file, some internal element, then deleting the file in the same runnable is properly reported as a noop in the deltas.
    void
    testDeleteElementSchedulingRule()
    Ensures that an internal element can be deleted inside a scheduling rule that includes the resource only.
    void
    testDeleteInternal()
    Ensures that a top internal element is deleted, all its descendants are also deleted.
    void
    testDeleteInternalCancelled()
    Ensures that deletion can be canceled.
    void

    Ensures that multiple member Rodin elements contained within different compilation units can be deleted.
    void

    Should be able to delete a Rodin file.
    void

    After deleting a Rodin file in an IWorkspaceRunnable, it should not exist.
    void

    • testDeleteInternal

      public void testDeleteInternal() throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Ensures that a top internal element is deleted, all its descendants are also deleted. Verify that the correct change deltas are generated.
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException

      public void testDeleteMultipleMembersFromVariousRFs() throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException

      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException

      Ensure that the correct exception is thrown for invalid input to the DeleteOperation

    • testBug702

      public void testBug702() throws Exception
      Ensures that creating a file, some internal element, then deleting the file in the same runnable is properly reported as a noop in the deltas.
      Throws:
      Exception
